articles.title: Get AMD's flagship Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 32GB of DDR5 memory and an MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7 motherboard at a discount — Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon
articles.summary: Micro Center is now selling some of its bundles on Amazon, including this 9800X3D combo that gives you an excellent motherboard and fast RAM without breaking the bank.
articles.title_zh: 在亞馬遜上以折扣價購買AMD旗艦級Ryzen 7 9800X3D、32GB DDR5記憶體和MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7主機板——Micro Center套裝組合現已推出
articles.summary_zh: Micro Center現在在亞馬遜上銷售其部分套裝組合，包括這款9800X3D組合，提供優質的主機板和高速RAM，價格實惠。

articles.title: WD's 2TB Black SSD price drops by nearly 20% ahead of Prime Day sale — grab the 2TB SN7100 for $242.96
articles.summary: The WD Black SN7100 stands out for its high-end performance, low operating temperatures, and impressive efficiency. It is one of the few PCIe 4.0 SSDs that can compete with flagship drives while consuming noticeably less power.
articles.title_zh: WD Black SSD 2TB價格在Prime Day前夕下降近20%——以$242.96購買2TB SN7100
articles.summary_zh: WD Black SN7100以其高端性能、低運作溫度和卓越效率而備受矚目，是少數能與旗艦級驅動器相競爭的PCIe 4.0 SSD之一，同時功耗明顯更低。

articles.title: Apple @ Work: The era of legacy MDM is over, and declarative management is the new standard
articles.summary: Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle , the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage, and protect Apple devices at work. Over 45,000 organizations trust Mosyle to make millions of Apple devices work ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple . WWDC has come and gone once again, and there are a number of key updates coming to the IT world this fall. One note before we begin: now is the time to test your device workflows, apps, etc. Bugs that are reported early in the beta process are the ones that get fixed. With macOS 27 and
articles.title_zh: Apple @ Work：舊版 MDM 時代已終結，聲明式管理成為新標準
articles.summary_zh: Apple @ Work 由 Mosyle（唯一的 Apple 統一平台）獨家呈獻，提供單一專業級平台整合所有必要解決方案，可無縫自動部署、管理和保護工作中的 Apple 設備。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Brink’ brings a feature-rich experience to iPhone podcast listening
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . If you’re looking to level up your podcast experience, check out Brink . It’s a well made iOS podcast app with rich features, including a news tab, podcast summaries, trending podcasts, AI playlists, and much more. It’s also well made for iOS 26 and Liquid Glass, and feels right at home on the iPhone.
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用亮點：'Brink' 為 iPhone 播客收聽帶來功能豐富的體驗
articles.summary_zh: 本週的獨立應用亮點介紹 Brink，這是一款精心製作的 iOS 播客應用，如果您想提升播客體驗，可以查看該應用。

articles.title: Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 leaks reveal more changes, no Classic after all [Gallery]
articles.summary: Ahead of Samsung’s July event, new leaks are revealing a few more details about Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2.
articles.title_zh: Galaxy Watch 9 和 Ultra 2 洩露揭示更多變化，最終無 Classic 版本 [相冊]
articles.summary_zh: 在三星 7 月活動前，新洩露的信息透露了有關 Galaxy Watch 9 和 Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 的更多詳情。

articles.title: Has your Pixel battery life improved after updating to Android 17? [Poll]
articles.summary: Whenever you install a massive new platform update on your phone, there are bound to be both intended and unintended consequences. One of the most critical factors is always longevity, which has us asking: Have you noticed y our Pixel’s battery life improve with Android 17?
articles.title_zh: 更新到 Android 17 後，您的 Pixel 電池續航是否改善？[投票]
articles.summary_zh: 在手機上安裝大型平台更新後，電池續航是最關鍵的因素之一，我們想了解您的 Pixel 在 Android 17 更新後電池續航是否有所改善。

articles.title: Weekly poll: what device do you use for gaming? A smartphone, tablet, PC or console?
articles.summary: The gaming market has had a rough go of it this decade – first COVID slowed down the rollout of the PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X, then the crypto boom vacuumed up available GPUs, now AI has made RAM chips the new gold. This has led to smartphone makers rising prices, but PCs and consoles are just as affected – the PS5, the Xbox, the Steam Deck and the Nintendo Switch all got more expensive. And that’s just some of the more high-profile products. Services are feeling the pain too – Microsoft wanted to raise the price of Game Pass, but changed its mind after loud complaints from...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：您使用哪種設備進行遊戲？智能手機、平板電腦、PC 還是遊戲機？
articles.summary_zh: 遊戲市場在這十年裡面臨多重挑戰，包括 COVID 延遲主機發佈、加密貨幣搶佔 GPU 和 AI 推高 RAM 晶片價格，導致智能手機、PC 和遊戲機價格上升。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: iOS 27 is okay, just okay
articles.summary: iOS 27 was met with a resounding “it’s okay” in last week’s poll. Okay, the sentiment among iPhone users actually leans towards positive, but most voters couldn’t work up enough enthusiasm for it to pick the “love it” option. To be fair, this release was focused on sanding off the rough edges of the major Liquid Glass redesign and on finally delivering on promises about AI features that Apple made a long while ago. Remember all the Apple Intelligence demos during the iPhone 16 launch? Yeah, Siri AI is launching later this year, likely alongside the iPhone 18 Pro models. Even if you...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：iOS 27 不過如此
articles.summary_zh: 在上週的投票中，iOS 27 獲得了「還可以」的一致評價，雖然 iPhone 用戶的情緒偏向正面，但大多數投票者無法為其選擇「喜歡」選項。

articles.title: Deals: Samsung Galaxy S25 FE price drops again, OnePlus 15 and 15R, Nothing phones are on sale
articles.summary: Reminder: Prime Day is next week. You will need an active Prime subscription to get the lower prices, though the free trial usually works – unless you have already used it recently. This week, you don’t need Prime to get these deals. The Samsung Galaxy S25 FE stayed at MSRP for a few weeks after the launch of the Galaxy A57. Now the FE model is back where it should be – at just under $600 for the 8/256GB model. We have a detailed Galaxy S25 FE vs. A57 comparison article to help you choose between these two (though given that they cost the same, the choice is easy enough). ...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Samsung Galaxy S25 FE 價格再次下降，OnePlus 15 和 15R、Nothing 手機正在特賣
articles.summary_zh: 提醒：Prime Day 下週舉行，需要有效的 Prime 訂閱才能獲得較低價格，本週無需 Prime 即可享受這些優惠。

articles.title: Samsung is now testing One UI 9 for the Galaxy Z Fold7, A56, S23, and S24 series
articles.summary: Samsung recently released the third One UI 9 beta for the Galaxy S26 series smartphones, which are currently the only smartphones eligible for the One UI 9 beta program. However, the Korean brand is already working on One UI 9 for the Galaxy S25 series, Galaxy A16 5G, Galaxy A17 5G, Galaxy A34, Galaxy A57, and the unannounced Galaxy S26 FE, and it has now begun testing One UI 9 for even more Galaxy smartphones. [#InlinePriceWidget,13826,1#] Samsung has started testing One UI 9 for the Galaxy Z Fold7, Galaxy A56, Galaxy S23, and the Galaxy S24 series. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 The...
articles.title_zh: 三星正在為 Galaxy Z Fold7、A56、S23 和 S24 系列測試 One UI 9
articles.summary_zh: 三星最近為 Galaxy S26 系列發佈了第三個 One UI 9 測試版，並正在為多款機型開發 One UI 9，包括 Galaxy S25 系列和多款 Galaxy A 系列。

articles.title: Motorola bumps up the storage on the Edge 70 Fusion
articles.summary: Motorola launched the Edge 70 Fusion in March, and so far it's been available in India with up to 256GB of storage. Now, however, the company has announced a new variant which pairs 12GB of RAM with 512GB of storage. [#InlinePriceWidget,14432,1#] The price for the new model is INR 36,999, which translates into about $391 at the current exchange rate. You can pick one up from Motorola’s online store in Pantone Silhouette, Pantone Blue Surf, or Pantone Orient Blue. The other specs have of course remained the same. So you get a 6.78-inch AMOLED display with a 144Hz refresh rate and...
articles.title_zh: Motorola 提升 Edge 70 Fusion 的存儲容量
articles.summary_zh: Motorola 在 3 月推出 Edge 70 Fusion，現已推出新的 12GB RAM 和 512GB 存儲版本，價格為 INR 36,999。

articles.title: Signal’s Meredith Whittaker wants you to remember that AI chatbots ‘are not your friends’
articles.summary: "These are not your friends. These are not conscious beings. These are not sentient interlocutors.”
articles.title_zh: Signal 的 Meredith Whittaker 提醒你 AI 聊天機器人「不是你的朋友」
articles.summary_zh: 「這些不是你的朋友。這些不是有意識的生物。這些不是具有感知能力的對話者。」

articles.summary_zh: 那麼⋯⋯你的 In the Weights 分數是多少？

articles.title: Nobel laureate John Jumper is leaving DeepMind for rival Anthropic
articles.summary: Jumper isn't the only big name leaving Google DeepMind.
articles.title_zh: 諾貝爾獎得主 John Jumper 離開 DeepMind 轉投競爭對手 Anthropic
articles.summary_zh: Jumper 不是唯一離開 Google DeepMind 的知名人士。

articles.title: Gemini CLI vs. Antigravity: What works, not the spec sheet
articles.summary: Google has decommissioned its Gemini CLI, the open-source terminal tool that just shipped last year. It had over 100,000 GitHub stars and hundreds of contributors, and the replacement is Antigravity CLI, a closed-source Go binary you invoke with the command agy . As of June 18, the Gemini CLI stopped serving requests for free, AI Pro, and Ultra personal accounts. There is no grace period. If you’re on a personal plan, June 18 was the day the old tool went dark. Google’s pitch for the swap is built on three claims. To quote group product manager Dmitry Lyalin and principal engineer Taylor Mullen in the announcement : “Built in Go, Antigravity CLI is snappier and more responsive.” It runs “multiple agents for complex tasks in the background, letting you run large-scale refactors or research
articles.title_zh: Gemini CLI vs. Antigravity：實際運作情況，不只是規格說明
articles.summary_zh: Google 已停用其 Gemini CLI 開源終端工具（去年才發布，擁有超過 10 萬個 GitHub stars），並以閉源 Go 二進制檔案 Antigravity CLI 取代，透過 agy 命令調用。自 6 月 18 日起，Gemini CLI 已停止服務。

articles.title: Millions in Brazil Get Fake Government Mobile Alert After Hack
articles.summary: Brazil’s Integration and Regional Development Ministry and federal police are investigating an intrusion into the civil defense alert system that sent messages containing the word “misanthropy” to the mobile phones of millions of Brazilians.
articles.title_zh: 巴西數百萬人在系統遭駭後收到虛假政府手機警報
articles.summary_zh: 巴西融合與區域發展部和聯邦警察正在調查民防警報系統遭入侵事件,該入侵導致包含「misanthropy」字樣的訊息被發送到數百萬巴西民眾的手機上。

articles.summary_zh: Corsair 針對 14.5 吋 Xeneon Edge 觸控螢幕推出 20% 折扣，將價格降至 $199.99，相比原價節省 $50。

articles.title: Ingenious modder converts countertop ice machine into an RTX 3060 GPU cooler with a beer fridge thermostat — mod reduces temps by up to 62% in games, Cyberpunk 2077 runs at 22°C
articles.summary: Turns out, an ice machine can cool a GPU perfectly fine as long as you're willing to modify it to the extreme and are patient enough to deal with the leaks.
articles.title_zh: 巧妙改裝者將商用製冰機改造為 RTX 3060 GPU 冷卻器，配備啤酒冷藏溫度計 — 改裝降溫幅度達 62%，《賽博朋克 2077》運行溫度為 22°C
articles.summary_zh: 製冰機可完美冷卻 GPU，只要願意進行極端改裝並能耐心應對滲漏問題即可。

articles.title: Open-source Vulkan driver NVK gains experimental DLSS support — bringing Nvidia’s upscaling tech to Linux via imported CUDA binaries
articles.summary: NVK, the community-built open-source Vulkan driver for Nvidia GPUs in Mesa, has gained experimental DLSS support.
articles.title_zh: 開源 Vulkan 驅動程式 NVK 獲得實驗性 DLSS 支援 — 通過導入 CUDA 二進位檔案將 Nvidia 升級技術引入 Linux
articles.summary_zh: Mesa 中社群開發的開源 Vulkan 驅動程式 NVK 已獲得實驗性 DLSS 支援。

articles.title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash —  French publisher established in 1986 became one of the biggest entertainment companies in the world
articles.summary: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot was killed when his twin-engine private plane crashed enroute to an airshow. Aside from building the French gaming empire, Guillemot was also a licensed and avid pilot.
articles.title_zh: Ubisoft 聯合創辦人 Claude Guillemot 在飛機失事中喪生 — 1986 年成立的法國發行商成為全球最大娛樂公司之一
articles.summary_zh: Ubisoft 聯合創辦人 Claude Guillemot 駕駛雙引擎私人飛機前往飛行表演時失事身亡；除了創建法國遊戲帝國外，Guillemot 還是持證飛行員與熱情飛行愛好者。

articles.title: Samsung's 32-inch 1440p 165 Hz gaming monitor falls to its lowest price yet with 46% off for Prime Day — grab the curved Odyssey G55C at just $189.99
articles.summary: Featuring a 32-inch 1000R curved QHD panel, 165 Hz refresh rate, 1 ms MPRT response time, and AMD FreeSync support, the Samsung Odyssey G5 G55C has dropped to its lowest price of $189.99 ahead of Prime Day.
articles.title_zh: Samsung 32 吋 1440p 165 Hz 電競螢幕提前 Prime Day 優惠 46% — 曲面 Odyssey G55C 僅售 $189.99
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Odyssey G5 G55C 搭載 32 吋 1000R 曲面 QHD 面板、165 Hz 刷新率、1 ms MPRT 回應時間與 AMD FreeSync 支援，價格已降至最低的 $189.99。

articles.title: One of our favorite budget gaming keyboards drops back down to its lowest-ever price of $45 at Amazon — RK R65 packs lubed switches, metallic knob, and gasket mount for excellent sound and feel
articles.summary: Our favorite 60% budget gaming keyboard, the Royal Kludge R65, is back down to just $44 with coupon at Amazon, its lowest-ever price. This wired clacker delivers excellent sound and feel for the price, thanks to lubed switches, a gasket mount, and silicone pads. It also has a metal knob and QMK/VIA support.
articles.title_zh: 我們最喜愛的平價電競鍵盤跌至史上最低價 $45 — RK R65 搭載潤滑軸體、金屬滾輪與軸座固定，提供優異音感與手感
articles.summary_zh: 平價 60% 電競鍵盤 Royal Kludge R65 在 Amazon 使用優惠券後價格回落至 $44，為史上最低價；此款有線鍵盤因潤滑軸體、軸座固定與矽膠墊提供優異音感與手感，並配備金屬滾輪與 QMK/VIA 支援。

articles.title: Dramatically redesigned GMKtec EVO-X3 shown bearing Lisa Su’s signature of approval — flagship AI mini PC workstation is built around AMD’s Ryzen AI Max+ 395 'Strix Halo' processor, again
articles.summary: GMKtec's dramatically redesigned EVO-X3 'Strix Halo' Mini PC gets Lisa Su’s signature of approval.
articles.title_zh: 大幅重新設計的 GMKtec EVO-X3 獲得 Lisa Su 的簽名認可 — 旗艦 AI 迷你 PC 工作站採用 AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 'Strix Halo' 處理器
articles.summary_zh: GMKtec 大幅重新設計的 EVO-X3 'Strix Halo' Mini PC 獲得 Lisa Su 的簽名認可。

articles.title: Samsung and SK hynix bonuses for chip workers flagged as a national inflation risk — Bank of Korea projects full-year inflation significantly above its 2% target
articles.summary: The Bank of Korea has named performance bonuses at Samsung Electronics and SK hynix as a risk to the country's inflationary stability.
articles.title_zh: Samsung 與 SK hynix 員工獎金被列為國家通膨風險 — 韓國央行預測全年通膨率遠高於 2% 目標
articles.summary_zh: 韓國央行已將 Samsung Electronics 與 SK hynix 的績效獎金列為國家通膨穩定風險。

articles.title: Telehealth doctor treats patients using Razer Naga gaming mouse — 12-button MMO thumb grid simplifies medical workflow, automates medical scripting
articles.summary: Dr. James Ries says that his Razer Naga V2 MMO gaming mouse helps him treat patients by keeping relevant medical responses at his fingertips.
articles.title_zh: 遠距醫療醫生使用 Razer Naga 電競滑鼠診治患者 — 12 鍵 MMO 拇指網格簡化醫療工作流程，自動化醫療文稿記錄
articles.summary_zh: 醫生 James Ries 表示 Razer Naga V2 MMO 電競滑鼠有助於他診治患者，讓相關醫療回應信息觸手可及。

articles.title: Creality Falcon T1 review: Modular laser engraving
articles.summary: The Creality Falcon T1 is a galvo laser engraver that uses swappable diode, fiber, UV, and MOPA laser modules to engrave wood, crystal, metal, and a wide range of other materials. With a base price of $2,249, the Falcon T1 offers a promising platform for an ecosystem that includes a conveyor belt, rotary attachment, and an air filter. Only three of the five advertised modules are available for purchase at launch, so while the T1 is off to a good start, it may need more time to mature.
articles.title_zh: Creality Falcon T1 評測：模組化雷射雕刻機
articles.summary_zh: Creality Falcon T1 是一款振鏡雷射雕刻機，搭載可交換的二極體、光纖、紫外與 MOPA 雷射模組，可在木材、水晶、金屬等多種材料上雕刻，基礎價格為 $2,249。

articles.title: Age of Empires II’s goats used as AI building blocks to build a neural network — goaty experiment mocks the idea of chatbot consciousness, Microsoft AI researcher’s project makes an absurdist point about AI consciousness
articles.summary: People seem all-too-ready to anthropomorphize LLMs and AI chatbots like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini, reckons a Microsoft AI researcher.
articles.title_zh: 《帝國時代 II》的山羊被用作 AI 構件以建立神經網路 — 這個山羊實驗嘲弄聊天機器人意識觀念，微軟 AI 研究人員專案提出對 AI 意識的荒誕評論
articles.summary_zh: 微軟 AI 研究人員認為人們似乎過於容易將 ChatGPT、Claude 與 Gemini 等 LLM 與 AI 聊天機器人擬人化。

articles.title: Acoustic mapping app uses thousands of networked old Android phones to hunt Shahed drones — crowd-sourced microphone network spots small, low-RCS military targets
articles.summary: This app would crowdsource drone detection and help map their location and direction long before they reach their targets.
articles.title_zh: 聲學映射應用程式利用數千台聯網舊 Android 手機獵捕 Shahed 無人機 — 眾包麥克風網路發現小型低 RCS 軍事目標
articles.summary_zh: 此應用程式可眾包無人機偵測並幫助識別其位置與方向，在其到達目標前很早就能發現。

articles.title: John Ternus set to re-establish importance of Apple’s design team when he takes over as CEO: report
articles.summary: Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman today posted the latest edition of his Power On newsletter , recapping the last ten years of Apple’s corporate structure in which the influence of the design team waned at the executive levels in the Cook era, fuelled by Jony Ive’s exit and talent departures as finance and operations had an increasingly larger say over product direction. However, Gurman believes that incoming CEO John Ternus may be about to reset that relationship, and reaffirm the importance of the design group for the company’s future.
articles.title_zh: John Ternus 接任 Apple CEO 時將重新確立設計團隊的重要性：報告
articles.summary_zh: Bloomberg 記者 Mark Gurman 在最新一期 Power On 通訊中回顧了過去十年 Apple 的公司結構，指出在 Cook 時代設計團隊的影響力因 Jony Ive 離職和人才流失而逐漸減弱。

articles.title: RIP Nest Mini – The Google Home Speaker isn’t a replacement, but hopefully the start of a new era
articles.summary: The Google Home Speaker finally has a release date and, with it, Google has also ended its long-running and mega-hit Nest Mini speaker. It leaves the lineup in a weird place, as Google has a product that doesn’t replace anything it had before, and might not be everyone’s cup of tea either. This issue of 9to5Google Weekender is a part of 9to5Google’s newsletter that highlights the biggest Google stories with added commentary and more. Sign up here to get Weekender delivered to your inbox early every weekend, and catch our weekday roundups too!
articles.title_zh: 安息 Nest Mini – Google Home Speaker 不是替代品，但希望能開啟新時代
articles.summary_zh: Google Home Speaker 終於有了發布日期，同時 Google 也結束了長期運營的熱門產品 Nest Mini。這讓產品線陷入尷尬境地，因為 Google 推出的新產品沒有替代任何現有產品。

articles.title: Roborock heads to Miami with a community classroom, a mall pop-up, and its flagship robots
articles.summary: Credit: Stephen Schenck / Android Authority The football World Cup has a way of turning living rooms into stadiums. Friends pile in, the snacks come out, and for a few hours, the only thing that matters is what is happening on the screen. You should be spending those hours with the people you care about and enjoying the game, instead of chasing crumbs and spills around the house. And that’s exactly what Roborock delivers. That’s the basis of Roborock’s “Your Home. Your Stadium.” campaign. As the world’s biggest football celebration comes to North America, Roborock is positioning itself less as an automated cleaning brand and more as a builder of intelligent home systems. The idea is simple – let Roborock handle maintaining your home and outdoors, so you’ll have more time to catch the game.
articles.title_zh: Roborock 登陸邁阿密，推出社區教室、商場快閃店和旗艦機器人
articles.summary_zh: Roborock 在邁阿密舉辦活動展示其旗艦掃地機器人產品，包括社區教室和商場快閃店等體驗。

articles.title: I’ve used Android for years — these are 7 buried features I wish everyone would use
articles.summary: I’ve been writing about Android smartphones for years, so I know a lot of the tricks and hidden features that can improve a user’s experience. At the same time, I’m constantly finding out about features that went unnoticed by me thanks to complicated menus and differing Android skins . Once I discover these features, though, I become akin to a street preacher sharing the good news of Android optimization. And today I’m here to share some of the most useful buried features I wish more people knew about.
articles.title_zh: 我使用 Android 多年 – 這 7 個隱藏功能我希望每個人都會用
articles.summary_zh: 作者分享了多年來在 Android 智慧手機上發現的 7 個隱藏功能，這些功能因複雜的菜單和不同的 Android 皮膚設計而常被忽視。

articles.title: 5 abandoned Android launchers I wish were still alive today
articles.summary: I’d argue that the Android launcher space is the healthiest it has been in decades. Even though contenders like Nova Launcher are no longer considered the pinnacle for many, a slew of others focusing on various use cases and filling multiple niches are available. Think of Octopi Launcher for its fluidity and support for multiple screen devices and layouts, Kvaesitso for a launcher that’s built with search first and foremost, Niagara Launcher for those who require a stripped-down yet visually engaging experience, or Lawnchair for an open-source taste of Pixel Launcher. And I’m genuinely just skimming the surface of a very deep pool.
articles.title_zh: 5 個我希望仍然活著的已廢棄 Android 啟動器
articles.summary_zh: 雖然 Nova Launcher 等競爭對手不再是許多人的首選，但 Android 啟動器生態系統現在擁有專注於各種用例的多個選項。

articles.title: Sideloading Android apps is great — until you have to update them. Here’s my fix
articles.summary: The Google Play Store is home to millions of Android apps across numerous categories, enough to cater to the needs of an average Android user. However, you’d be surprised to know that some of the best Android apps are missing from the Play Store . You can find many of these apps on alternative app stores or code repositories like GitHub. Some of the apps are also available on the developer’s own websites. While downloading and installing such apps on your Android phone isn’t hard, keeping them updated is a chore. If you’re like me and have many non-Play Store apps installed on your Android phone, you’d know what I’m talking about.
articles.title_zh: 側載 Android 應用很棒 – 直到你必須更新它們。這是我的解決方案
articles.summary_zh: Google Play Store 擁有數百萬個 Android 應用，但許多最佳應用並不在其中，用戶可以在替代應用商店找到它們。

articles.title: The Lenovo Idea Tab Plus is the budget Android tablet Samsung should be worried about
articles.summary: Lenovo has been making a whole bunch of strong Android tablets for a while now, but following them is a nightmare because the company has an inexplicable aversion to simple numeric naming. It often expects you to remember whether you’re looking at a Tab Plus, Idea Tab, Yoga Tab, Tab M, Legion Tab, or whatever other combination of words it chose that year. Thankfully, Lenovo’s current budget tablet lineup — the Idea family — is a little easier to understand. There is the Lenovo Idea Tab, the Lenovo Idea Tab Plus, and the Lenovo Idea Tab Pro . The one I’ve been using is the middle child, the Lenovo Idea Tab Plus (), and it goes directly against the Samsung Galaxy Tab A11 Plus I recently reviewed.
articles.title_zh: Lenovo Idea Tab Plus 是三星應該擔心的預算 Android 平板
articles.summary_zh: Lenovo 一直在製造許多強大的 Android 平板，但該公司複雜的命名方案使其產品線難以追蹤。

articles.title: I’ve had the Pixel 10 for 10 months, and I’m still confused by its best camera feature
articles.summary: Auto Best Take Credit: C. Scott Brown / Android Authority It’s been nearly 10 months since the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL arrived at my door, and I’ve been using it as my main phone ever since. It’s my go-to camera, too, and I’ve shot over 4,000 photos and videos with it so far. So when I say that I’m dumbfounded by one of its camera features, please know that it’s not for lack of trying. The feature I’m specifically talking about is Auto Best Take , which is the smarter and less involved version of the previous Pixels’ Best Take. And no matter what I try, I just can’t get it to work for me.
articles.title_zh: 我使用 Pixel 10 已 10 個月，仍對其最佳相機功能感到困惑
articles.summary_zh: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL 使用者在使用近 10 個月後，對其 Auto Best Take 相機功能仍感到困惑。

articles.title: 5 apps you should use instead of Google Password Manager
articles.summary: Google Password Manager — and many other first-party password managers — are sold as the epitome of convenience. They reduce the friction of getting started, but that convenience often comes at the cost of ecosystem lock-in . Sharing vaults, exporting data, and switching platforms become trickier than they need to be. That’s why many users prefer dedicated third-party password managers. Beyond working across platforms, they tend to offer more control over your data, stronger sharing features, and extras like secure file and ID storage.
articles.title_zh: 5 個應該用來替代 Google Password Manager 的應用
articles.summary_zh: Google Password Manager 等第一方密碼管理器因生態系統鎖定而常以犧牲隱私換取便利。

articles.title: I love Duolingo, but its XP Boosts are driving me mad
articles.summary: I’ve been using Duolingo for more than a year, and it’s been a great journey learning new Chinese words and practicing Chess tactics. I am a big fan of the gamified approach, especially daily streaks, as they keep me hooked and coming back for more every day, helping me build a learning habit. But now more than ever, this daily learning streak has evolved into a distinct anxiety, all thanks to the XP Boost rewards at the end of the lesson. Picture this: You sit down at the end of a chaotic day, tired but intent on doing just enough to keep your momentum alive. You tap through a quick, five-minute lesson to keep your streak glowing. But alongside a satisfying wrap-up screen, a virtual chest also bursts open across your display. “Congratulations! You’ve unlocked a 3x XP Boost for the next 10
articles.title_zh: 我喜愛 Duolingo，但它的 XP Boost 讓我瘋狂
articles.summary_zh: 作者使用 Duolingo 超過一年，對其遊戲化的學習方式和每日連續獎勵讚不絕口，但 XP Boost 功能令人沮喪。

articles.title: Redmi Turbo 5 and Sharp Aquos R11, DJI Osmo Pocket 4P official, Week 25 in review
articles.summary: Welcome to another week's recap. Sharp has announced the Aquos R11, its latest flagship, with the headline upgrade being a new 38.5MP telephoto camera offering 2.8x optical zoom. The phone is powered by Qualcomm's Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 chipset and features a 6.5-inch 240Hz OLED display, a 5,000mAh battery, and Android 16 out of the box. It launches in Japan next month, with no global release plans announced yet. Xiaomi brought the Redmi Turbo 5 to India, with a massive 7,540mAh battery. It pairs it with MediaTek's new Dimensity 8500 Ultra chipset, 100W fast charging, and a 6.59-inch 120Hz...
articles.title_zh: Redmi Turbo 5 和 Sharp Aquos R11、DJI Osmo Pocket 4P 官宣，第 25 週回顧
articles.summary_zh: Sharp 發布 Aquos R11 旗艦機，搭載 Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 晶片和新的 38.5MP 長焦鏡頭，提供 2.8 倍光學變焦。

articles.title: Deals: Samsung's latest Galaxy Z foldables discounted, iPhone 17 Pro, Pixel 10 Pro, Xiaomi 17T Pro also on sale
articles.summary: With Samsung's next-generation foldables expected to arrive next month, the current Galaxy Z Fold7 and Galaxy Z Flip7 continue to be sold at discounted prices. Several other Samsung phones have also received price cuts, alongside Apple's iPhone 17 Pro Max and Xiaomi's 17T series. The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 is eligible for a £200 discount during checkout, whereas the clamshell Galaxy Z Flip7 gets £150 off its original price. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 £200 off Read our review ...
articles.title_zh: 交易：Samsung 最新可摺疊手機折扣、iPhone 17 Pro、Pixel 10 Pro、小米 17T Pro 也在促銷中
articles.summary_zh: 隨著 Samsung 下一代可摺疊手機預計下月推出，Galaxy Z Fold7 和 Galaxy Z Flip7 繼續以折扣價銷售，Apple 和小米的新款手機也有價格優惠。

articles.title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro in for review
articles.summary: This is the Motorola Edge 70 Pro. It launched back in April, and it costs €540 with 8GB of RAM, and 256GB of storage. Depending on the location, there are a few Pantone colors to choose from: Titan, Zinfandel, Lily White, and Tea. In the box, you'll find the phone, a USB-C cable, and a hard case with MagSafe, which is a nice touch. In keeping with its moniker, the Edge 70 Pro is thin and light, measuring just over 7mm and 190 grams. It's also curved on both sides, which isn't the norm for a slab phone these days. We like the phone's feel in the hand, though it's a bit slippery,...
articles.title_zh: Motorola Edge 70 Pro 評測中
articles.summary_zh: Motorola Edge 70 Pro 於 4 月推出，配備 8GB RAM 和 256GB 儲存空間，售價 €540，提供多種 Pantone 配色選擇。

articles.title: When the Trump administration cracks down on Anthropic, who benefits?
articles.summary: On the new episode of Equity, we discussed what actually prompted the administration's latest moves against Anthropic, and what this might mean for the AI ecosystem.
articles.title_zh: 當 Trump 政府打擊 Anthropic 時，誰會受益？
articles.summary_zh: 在最新一期的 Equity 節目中，我們討論了是什麼促使政府採取最新行動對抗 Anthropic，以及這對 AI 生態系統可能意味著什麼。

articles.title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
articles.summary: Siri’s AI overhaul may have grabbed the headlines at WWDC, but some of Apple’s most useful AI features are arriving elsewhere in iOS 27.
articles.title_zh: 超越 Siri：iOS 27 中即將推出的實用 AI 功能
articles.summary_zh: Siri 的 AI 改造在 WWDC 上獲得了關注，但 Apple 最實用的一些 AI 功能將在 iOS 27 的其他地方推出。

articles.title: “An agent is an LLM and a harness”: What Nvidia really thinks about OpenClaw
articles.summary: How much of Nvidia is reflected by their visionary CEO, Jenson Huang? With his praise and later support of OpenClaw, Huang took a big step beyond the corporate boundary to embrace the “bad boy” of the agent world. Where exactly does Nvidia fit in here? The New Stack put that question to Nader Khalil , Director of Developer Technologies at Nvidia, as well as how Nvidia is working with developers on agentic AI projects. Nader Khalil, Director of Developer Technologies at Nvidia Khalil, co-founder of Brev.dev , found himself acquired by Nvidia about two years ago. His company helped startups access Nvidia AI chipsets. He is still excited by the possibilities of AI, and his energy is proof that Nvidia is enjoying the moment. Khalil was expansive, showing a startup’s keen
articles.title_zh: 「代理就是LLM和工具的組合」：Nvidia對OpenClaw的真實看法
articles.summary_zh: Nvidia執行長Jenson Huang對OpenClaw的讚賞與支持，標誌著該公司跨越企業界限擁抱智能體領域「壞小子」的重大一步。The New Stack探討Nvidia在這個生態中的確切定位。

articles.title: Wooting 60HE v2: Peak Keyboard Perfection
articles.summary: Wooting’s 60HE v2 isn’t just a terrific Hall Effect keyboard. It’s a fantastic keyboard period.
articles.title_zh: Wooting 60HE v2：鍵盤完美巔峰
articles.summary_zh: Wooting 的 60HE v2 不僅是一款出色的 Hall Effect 鍵盤，更是一款優秀的鍵盤。

articles.title: The Best NAS Devices for Your Home After Months of Testing
articles.summary: Network-attached storage (NAS) provides accessible shared space on your home network. After testing, these are my favorite NAS devices.
articles.title_zh: 經過數月測試後，最適合家庭的 NAS 設備
articles.summary_zh: 網路附加儲存 (NAS) 在家庭網路中提供易於存取的共享空間，經測試後，以下是我最喜歡的 NAS 設備。

articles.title: 28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next Level
articles.summary: Sure, anyone can use OpenAI’s chatbot. But with smart engineering, you can get way more interesting results.
articles.title_zh: 28 個技巧讓你的 ChatGPT 提示詞更上一層樓
articles.summary_zh: 任何人都可以使用 OpenAI 的聊天機器人，但透過巧妙的工程設計，你能獲得更有趣的結果。

articles.title: If You’re Searching for a New Skillet, Consider Stainless Steel
articles.summary: Stainless-steel pans may lack nonstick coatings, but they’re unfussy, they sear well, and they’re built for a lifetime of hard work.
articles.title_zh: 如果你正在尋找新的煎鍋，考慮不鏽鋼材質
articles.summary_zh: 不鏽鋼鍋可能缺乏不粘塗層，但它們不挑剔易用、煎烤效果好，且經久耐用。

articles.title: Buying a Used iPhone Makes More Sense Than Ever
articles.summary: With Apple raising prices soon, you can save a lot of money by buying a used handset or upgrading an older device—safe in the knowledge that it'll last longer than ever.
articles.title_zh: 購買二手 iPhone 現在比以往更有意義
articles.summary_zh: 隨著 Apple 即將提高價格，購買二手手機或升級舊裝置可以節省大量費用，且能確保它比以往持久。

articles.title: A Critical Deadline Is Approaching for Windows and Linux Security
articles.summary: The cryptographic keys that secure your computer's boot sequence will start to expire on June 24. Here's what that means for you.
articles.title_zh: Windows 和 Linux 安全的關鍵截止期限即將到來
articles.summary_zh: 保護電腦啟動序列的加密金鑰將於 6 月 24 日開始過期，以下說明對你的影響。

articles.title: UK to Ban Social Media for Under-16s Starting Next Year
articles.summary: Big tech companies design their products to maximize user attention, often without regard to whether the content is beneficial, especially for children. Beeban Kidron, author of 'Users,' joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini the need for government intervention to regulate product design, parental responsibility in managing usage, and consumer awareness to make informed choices in the attention economy. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 英國將從明年開始禁止 16 歲以下青少年使用社群媒體
articles.summary_zh: 大型科技公司設計產品時著重於最大化用戶關注度，往往忽視內容是否對兒童有益，政府干預變得越來越必要。

articles.title: Apple’s New CEO Must Rebuild a Design Team That Lost Its Way
articles.summary: Also: The 2027 iPhone and AirPods plans.
articles.title_zh: Apple 新任 CEO 必須重建迷失方向的設計團隊
articles.summary_zh: 另外：2027 年 iPhone 和 AirPods 計畫。

articles.title: Amazon Advances Prime Day by One Month Amid AI Shift
articles.summary: Amazon has moved its annual Prime Day sales event up by one month. The event is strategically important for Amazon as it aims to capture consumer spending, especially in a market where discretionary dollars are tightening and AI is increasingly influencing shopping behavior. Senior E-commerce and retail analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence Poonam Goyal explains the importance of Prime Day for Amazon to David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Amazon 在 AI 轉變中將 Prime Day 提前一個月
articles.summary_zh: Amazon 將年度 Prime Day 銷售活動提前了一個月，此舉對 Amazon 至關重要，因為消費者可自由支配的金額日益緊張，且 AI 正越來越多地影響購物行為。

articles.title: Review: Widow's Bay is a boldly original take on comedic horror
articles.summary: Widow's Bay , the delightfully eccentric new comedic horror series from Apple TV, is easily one of the best new series of the year. There's a reason everyone from Guillero del Toro and Ben Stiller to Damon Lindelolf ( Lost ) is raving about the show. It's an eminently binge-able, addictive series that pays tribute to all the classic horror tropes while reinventing them in surprising ways. Think Stephen King meets Parks and Recreation , with a dash of Twin Peaks —except Widow's Bay is very much its own refreshingly original beast. (Some spoilers below but no major reveals.) Tom Loftis (Matthew Rhys) is a widower and mayor of Widow's Bay, a quirky little seaside town that has a colorfully bizarre history marked by periodic tragedies. Tom is eager to elevate the town into a trendy summer tour
articles.title_zh: 評測：Widow's Bay 大膽詮釋喜劇恐怖類型
articles.summary_zh: Apple TV 新推出的古怪喜劇恐怖劇集 Widow's Bay 輕鬆成為今年最佳新劇之一，從 Guillero del Toro 到 Ben Stiller 和 Damon Lindelolf 都為這部劇集讚不絕口。
